tracks.rawText: 2:47Studio Selectionv5.5CoverHouse-reggae-dub dance built from one central sound: a dripping, filtered percussion loop, Distorted kick, pitched kick on the drop, rapid snare rolls, gated vocal chops, and a rhythmic synth lead drive the groove, Skanking offbeat guitar, spring-reverb organ, deep sub bass, tape echo, and wide dub delays give it pressure and space2PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 4:20Deseo⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀【𝗙𝗨𝗟𝗟​】 [2310940886]UploadReggaeton with Latin pop influences, Features a syncopated dembow drum pattern with a crisp snare and heavy kick, A melodic, plucked synth lead plays a repetitive minor-key riff, The bass is a deep, sub-heavy synth that follows the kick pattern, Male vocals are processed with pitch correction and light reverb, alternating between melodic singing and rhythmic delivery, Occasional atmospheric synth pads provide harmonic depth, Tempo is 95 BPM in the key of G# minor3PublishRemix
